title: taraxacum steveniiforme
intro: Taraxacum stevenii is a lesser-known species of dandelion, a perennial plant with bright yellow flowers and jagged-edged leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum stevenii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support liver function, act as a diuretic, and possess antimicrobial properties. Taraxacum stevenii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
